From Wikipedia:

zh.lifeSummary: Akarius FitzBardolph是Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth的兒子，於大約1085年出生在英國越可爾科比。他於1121年之前與Elizabeth d'Alselyn結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1161年在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年78歲，埋葬在英國越可爾文斯萊達爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Akarius FitzBardolph是Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth的儿子，于大约1085年出生在英国越可爾科比。他于1121年之前与Elizabeth d'Alselyn结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1161年在英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年78岁，埋葬在英国越可爾文斯萊達爾。

nameMeanings.name: Akarius
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from the personal name Karius, a short form of Makarius, from Greek Makarios ‘blessed’, a Christian saint's name.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Akarius FitzBardolph was born about 1085, in Kirby, Yorkshire, England as the son of Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth. He married Elizabeth d'Alselyn before 1121. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1161, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Wensleydale, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Akarius FitzBardolph est né environ 1085, à Kirby, Everwyck, Angleterre, fils de Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth. Il a épousé Elizabeth d'Alselyn avant 1121. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1161, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Wensleydale, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Great Carlton, Lincoln, England: Great Carlton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Akarius FitzBardolph wurde um 1085 in Kirby, Yorkshire, England, als Sohn von Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth geboren. Er hat vor 1121 Elizabeth d'Alselyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1161 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wensleydale, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Akarius FitzBardolph è nato il circa 1085 nel Kirby, Yorkshire, England come figlio di Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth. Lui sposato Elizabeth d'Alselyn prima del 1121. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1161, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Wensleydale, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Akarius FitzBardolphは約1085年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルビーでBardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworthの息子として生まれた。1121年以前にElizabeth d'Alselynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1161年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで78歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアウエンスリーダルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Akarius FitzBardolph(은)는 대략 1085년 영국 요르크실르 커비에서 Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1121년 이전 Elizabeth d'Alselyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1161년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 웬슬리데일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Akarius FitzBardolph nasceu aproximadamente 1085, em Kirby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filho de Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth d'Alselyn antes 1121. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1161, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Wensleydale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Great Carlton, Lincoln, England: Great Carlton, Lincolnshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Akarius FitzBardolph родился около 1085 г. в местности кирби, еркшир, Англия. Его отца звали Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth d'Alselyn перед 1121 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 1161 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности венслидеил, еркшир, Англия.
